isOpen.description: Controls whether the modal is visible

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when modal should close

title.description: Modal title displayed in the header. If not provided, close button appears in top-right corner

footer.description: Footer content rendered below the scrollable area. Always visible on screen regardless of content height

size.description: Modal width size (sm: 28rem, md: 32rem, lg: 42rem, xl: 56rem)

closeOnBackdrop.description: Whether clicking the backdrop (overlay) closes the modal
